summary: TWO_COLUMN tower rule E[X]=E[E[X|Y]]. LEFT axes with 3 conditional normal densities (μ=-2, 0.5, 2.5; σ=0.7) and YELLOW mixture + always_redraw vlines at each μ_k. ValueTracker w_tr interpolates prior p between (0.4, 0.3, 0.3) and (0.15, 0.35, 0.5). RIGHT DecimalNumbers show live p_k and Σp_k μ_k.
